name: What We Lose to Love
overview: Satria has to face a harsh reality. His first love, Dara, even prepares a wedding with a new lover, namely Rendra. In fact, they have been dating for five years. However, the happy plan just stopped when Dara suddenly "disappeared". Dara can't touch anything around her and can't be seen by anyone, except Satria.
